articles.headline: World Cup Daily: Ecuador, Curaçao look for first points; Norway fans in NYC
articles.description: It's yet another weekend of 2026 FIFA World Cup action, with four games slated for Saturday and a Norway fan takeover in New York City.

articles.headline: Irvine -  "Clear line on the rule"
articles.description: Ahead of Australia's final Group D matchup against Paraguay, Socceroos midfielder Jackson Irvine weighed on the controversial new red card offence for covering your mouth during play.

images.name: Irvine -  "Clear line on the rule"
images.caption: Ahead of Australia's final Group D matchup against Paraguay, Socceroos midfielder Jackson Irvine weighed on the controversial new red card offence for covering your mouth during play.

articles.headline: Ivory Coast coach Faé slams Germany's 'lack of fair play'
articles.description: Ivory Coast head coach Emerse Faé has criticized what he said was a lack of fair play from Germany during his team's 2-1 World Cup defeat on Saturday at BMO Field.

images.name: Ivory Coast and Germany coaches argument [1296x729]
images.caption: Ivory Coast coach Emerse Faé and Germany counterpart Julian Nagelsmann have a discussion following the end of Saturday's match.
images.alt:

articles.headline: Ivory Coast nearly beating Germany was not a surprise to anyone who's been watching
articles.description: Ivory Coast made no secret of their stated aims ahead of their second FIFA World Cup game against Germany on Saturday: beat Germany in Toronto and secure top spot in Group E. It was so close to coming true.

images.name: Ivory Coast clap [1296x729]
images.caption: Emmanuel Agbadou #20 and Christ Inao Oulai #26 of Cote d'Ivoire applaud fans after the 1-2 loss during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group E match between Germany and Ivory Coast.

images.name: Klinsmann: Germany 'really struggled' despite late win vs. Ivory Coast
images.caption: Klinsmann: Germany 'really struggled' despite late win vs. Ivory Coast

articles.headline: Deniz Undav is Germany's super sub again in comeback win vs. Ivory Coast
articles.description: Undav reprised his 'super sub' role with two priceless goals as Germany turned a 1-0 deficit into a 2-1 win that booked their spot in the Round of 32.

images.name: Deniz Undav celeb 260620 [1296x729]
images.credit: Jan Woitas/picture alliance via Getty Images

images.name: Klinsmann: Germany 'really struggled' despite late win vs. Ivory Coast
images.caption: Klinsmann: Germany 'really struggled' despite late win vs. Ivory Coast

articles.headline: Deniz Undav's second-half double saves Germany
articles.description: Super substitute Deniz Undav scores twice in 26 minutes to lift Germany to a 2-1 comeback win over the Ivory Coast and into the WC knockout rounds.

images.name: Deniz Undav's second-half double saves Germany
images.caption: Super substitute Deniz Undav scores twice in 26 minutes to lift Germany to a 2-1 comeback win over the Ivory Coast and into the WC knockout rounds.
